languages.text: Пробуждение древнего археотеха в Секторе Бионика открыло путь в секретную комнату, преграждаемый генетическим стражем. Вольному Торговцу необходимо попасть внутрь и раскрыть тайну загадочного владельца покоев.

Awakening the ancient archeotech in the Sector Bionica revealed a path to a secret chamber blocked by a genetic lock. The Rogue Trader must venture inside and uncover the truth behind the chamber's mysterious owner.
languages.original_text: Пробуждение древнего археотеха в Секторе Бионика открыло путь в секретную комнату, преграждаемый генетическим стражем. Вольному Торговцу необходимо попасть внутрь и раскрыть тайну загадочного владельца покоев.

traits.locale_text: Awakening the ancient archeotech in the Sector Bionica revealed a path to a secret chamber blocked by a genetic guardian. The Rogue Trader must venture inside and uncover the truth behind the chamber's mysterious owner.

languages.text: Die Erweckung der alten Archäotech im Sektor Bionica hat einen Weg zu einer mit einem genetischen Schloss gesicherten Geheimkammer offenbart. {mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} muss in der Kammer die Wahrheit über ihren geheimnisvollen Besitzer herausfinden.
languages.original_text: Awakening the ancient archeotech in the Sector Bionica revealed a path to a secret chamber blocked by a genetic lock. The Rogue Trader must venture inside and uncover the truth behind the chamber's mysterious owner.

traits.locale_text: Die Erweckung der alten Archäotech im Sektor Bionica hat einen Weg zu einer mit einem genetischen Schloss gesicherten Geheimkammer offenbart. {mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} muss in der Kammer die Wahrheit über ihren geheimnisvollen Besitzer herausfinden.

languages.text: Après l'éveil de la machine archéotechnologique dans le secteur Bionica, une salle secrète s'est révélée, scellée par un verrou génétique. {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} doit y pénétrer et découvrir l'identité de son mystérieux propriétaire.
languages.original_text: Awakening the ancient archeotech in the Sector Bionica revealed a path to a secret chamber blocked by a genetic lock. The Rogue Trader must venture inside and uncover the truth behind the chamber's mysterious owner.

traits.locale_text: Après l'éveil de la machine archéotechnologique dans le secteur Bionica, une salle secrète s'est révélée, scellée par un verrou génétique. {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} doit y pénétrer et découvrir l'identité de son mystérieux propriétaire.

languages.text: 唤醒仿生区的远古科技后，竟显现出一条通往密室的路，但入口被基因锁封住了。行商浪人必须进入其中，揭开密室神秘主人的真相。
languages.original_text: Awakening the ancient archeotech in the Sector Bionica revealed a path to a secret chamber blocked by a genetic lock. The Rogue Trader must venture inside and uncover the truth behind the chamber's mysterious owner.

traits.locale_text: 唤醒仿生区的远古科技后，竟显现出一条通往密室的路，但入口被基因锁封住了。行商浪人必须进入其中，揭开密室神秘主人的真相。

languages.text: Al despertar la antigua arqueotecnología del Sector Bionica, salió a la luz una cámara secreta sellada con un cierre genético. {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente debe adentrarse y descubrir la verdad sobre su misterioso propietario.
languages.original_text: Awakening the ancient archeotech in the Sector Bionica revealed a path to a secret chamber blocked by a genetic lock. The Rogue Trader must venture inside and uncover the truth behind the chamber's mysterious owner.

traits.locale_text: Al despertar la antigua arqueotecnología del Sector Bionica, salió a la luz una cámara secreta sellada con un cierre genético. {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente debe adentrarse y descubrir la verdad sobre su misterioso propietario.

languages.text: バイオニック・セクターの暴動後の改修工事中、彼らは遺伝子ロックで施錠された隠し部屋を発見した。
languages.original_text: During renovation work after the riot in the Bionic Sector, they discovered a hidden room locked with a genetic lock.

languages.text: Sektör Biyonika'daki kadim arkeoteki uyandırmak, genetik bir kilitle engellenmiş gizli bir odaya giden yolu ortaya çıkardı. Hür Tacir, içeri girmeli ve odanın gizemli sahibinin ardındaki gerçeği ortaya çıkarmalı.
languages.original_text: Awakening the ancient archeotech in the Sector Bionica revealed a path to a secret chamber blocked by a genetic lock. The Rogue Trader must venture inside and uncover the truth behind the chamber's mysterious owner.

traits.locale_text: Sektör Biyonika'daki kadim arkeoteki uyandırmak, genetik bir kilitle engellenmiş gizli bir odaya giden yolu ortaya çıkardı. Hür Tacir, içeri girmeli ve odanın gizemli sahibinin ardındaki gerçeği ortaya çıkarmalı.
